components.name: Animated Glowing Text
components.description: Animated SVG drawing trace outline over shimmering text characters.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content to be displayed.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: The font size of the text.

props.name: fontWeight
props.description: The CSS font-weight of the text.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Fill color of the text face.

props.name: outlineColor
props.description: The default color of the text stroke outline.

props.name: colors
props.description: Array of colors forming the animated gradient sweep.

props.name: outlineWidth
props.description: Width of the stroke outline.

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the stroke-drawing animation for a SINGLE character (in seconds).

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Delay between each character starting to draw (in seconds).

props.name: dashArray
props.description: Length of the SVG stroke dash array. Tune this higher for longer paths.

docs.overview: AnimatedGlowingTextOutline draws SVG stroke paths over each character, creating a glowing trace-reveal animation followed by a shimmering gradient sweep. Ideal for dramatic headings or hero callouts.

scenarios.title: Hero heading reveal
scenarios.description: Use a large font size and slow duration to make a memorable first impression above the fold.

scenarios.title: Loading splash screen
scenarios.description: Pair with a fullscreen overlay to reveal an app logo while assets load in the background.

scenarios.title: Section title accent
scenarios.description: Use a smaller font size inline with a dark section background for subtle section headings.

components.name: Moving Border
components.description: SVG-path-tracing animated border that orbits a button or card.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme; light or dark. Default: dark.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: The radius for rounding the button edges and the orbiting path.

props.name: children
props.description: The label or content displayed inside the button.

props.name: as
props.description: The HTML element tag to use for the button wrapper (e.g., 'button', 'div').

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes to the outermost container.

props.name: borderClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes directly to the moving animated SVG border.

props.name: duration
props.description: Time in milliseconds to complete one full orbit around the border.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes to the inner content layer.

docs.overview: MovingBorder traces an animated SVG path around a button or card, creating the appearance of a glowing line orbiting the element. The path speed and glow intensity are fully configurable.

scenarios.title: Highlighted CTA button
scenarios.description: Draw immediate attention to a primary action with an orbiting glow border.

scenarios.title: Featured pricing card
scenarios.description: Indicate the recommended pricing tier with a subtle moving border that stands out from static cards.

components.name: Typewriter Text
components.description: Character-by-character typing with blinking cursor, configurable speed, and delete-retype loop.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme; light or dark. Default: dark.

props.name: words
props.description: An array of words or phrases to be typed out sequentially.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes to the text container.

props.name: cursorClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes to customize the blinking cursor span.

props.name: typingSpeed
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between typing each character.

props.name: deletingSpeed
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between deleting each character.

props.name: delayBetweenWords
props.description: Pause duration before erasing a completed word to type the next.

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether the typewriter sequence should repeat infinitely.

props.name: cursor
props.description: Controls the visibility of the blinking cursor at the end of the text.

docs.overview: TypewriterText cycles through an array of words with a smooth typing and erasing animation. It's great for hero headings that need to convey multiple value propositions without cluttering the layout.

scenarios.title: Hero headline rotator
scenarios.description: Swap your hero subtitle or adjective with a typewriter that cycles through your key benefits.

scenarios.title: Loading / processing indicator
scenarios.description: Use a single looping word to hint that background work is in progress.

scenarios.title: Feature tagline in a navbar
scenarios.description: Animate a short tagline beside your logo to keep visitors engaged right from the header.

components.name: 3D Tilt Card
components.description: Perspective-shifting card that tilts toward the cursor with parallax layers and glare overlay.

props.name: children
props.description: The element(s) suspended inside the 3D card layout.

props.name: className
props.description: Tailwind configuration applied directly to the physical card.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Tailwind bounds defining the invisible hover hit-box.

props.name: tiltMaxDeg
props.description: The maximum angle the card aggressively pitches on hover.

props.name: perspective
props.description: The CSS perspective depth in pixels determining 3D deformation strength.

props.name: scale
props.description: Float multiplier for card scaling when hovered (e.g. 1.05).

props.name: glare
props.description: Enable a dynamic radial-gradient glare sweep that tracks the pointer.

props.name: glareMaxOpacity
props.description: Max brightness (0 to 1) for the dynamic glare effect.

components.usageCode:
import { TiltCard } from "@/components/ui/3d-tilt-card"; export default function Example() { return (

Hover me

Move your cursor over this card to see the 3D tilt effect with glare.

Extra Tilt

This card has a stronger tilt angle for a more dramatic effect.

); }

docs.overview: TiltCard responds to mouse position with a spring-driven 3D tilt effect, giving wrapped content a realistic depth. An optional glare overlay reinforces the illusion.

scenarios.title: Feature highlight card
scenarios.description: Wrap a feature card so users instinctively interact with it, naturally exploring the depth effect.

scenarios.title: Profile / team member card
scenarios.description: Give each team member card a tactile feel to make the About page more engaging.

scenarios.title: Pricing tier card
scenarios.description: Apply a gentle tilt to pricing cards so the recommended plan naturally commands attention on hover.

components.name: Spotlight Card
components.description: Card with a radial spotlight that follows the mouse cursor across its surface.

props.name: children
props.description: Components visible on the card.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes for sizing and styling the card layout.

props.name: spotlightColor
props.description: The hex/rgba color code used for the center cursor glow.

props.name: spotlightSize
props.description: Diameter width/height of the gradient spotlight in pixels.

docs.overview: SpotlightCard tracks your cursor and projects a soft radial light on the card surface, creating a sense of physical depth. Ideal anywhere you need premium-feeling content cards.

scenarios.title: Pricing tier card
scenarios.description: Make pricing options feel tactile and premium — spotlight highlights the selected plan naturally.
scenarios.code:

scenarios.title: Team member profile card
scenarios.description: Spotlight turns a standard team grid into an interactive, warm experience.

scenarios.title: Feature highlight card
scenarios.description: Wrap each feature description in a spotlight card to make your feature grid feel alive.

components.name: Aurora Background
components.description: A fully customizable, smooth aurora light background mimicking the northern lights. Configurable via exact hex props alongside automatic integration with the current light or dark mode theme. Accessibility: Respects prefers-reduced-motion (drifting pauses smoothly).

props.name: children
props.description: Content layered above the aurora; keep contrast high on the charcoal base.

props.name: className
props.description: Classes on the outer container (height, rounding, layout).

props.name: showRadialGradient
props.description: Radial vignette so the hero center stays readable.

props.name: theme
props.description: Dark uses screen blend; light uses multiply and a softer base.

props.name: preset
props.description: Color story: cinematic (reference-style pillars) or stitch (MCP showcase DS).

props.name: speed
props.description: Drift speed multiplier; higher = faster horizontal travel.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur strength multiplier for the pillar layer.

variants.label: Cinematic
Stitch DS

docs.overview: AuroraBackground renders a shifting, color-cycling radial gradient behind your content. It uses a CSS keyframe animation that's optimized for performance and respects prefers-reduced-motion.

scenarios.title: Full-page hero section
scenarios.description: Wrap your entire landing hero with the aurora to create an immediate cinematic impression.

scenarios.title: Feature section banner
scenarios.description: Apply the aurora to a single section mid-page to break up a long-scrolling layout.

scenarios.title: CTA section with custom colors
scenarios.description: Customize the aurora colors to match your brand palette on a bottom-of-page conversion section.

components.name: Animated Tabs
components.description: Tab bar with a sliding pill that morphs between active tabs using layout animation.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Array of tab configurations establishing navigation schema.

props.name: id
props.description: A unique identifier used strictly for layout animations.

props.name: label
props.description: The string/node rendered on the clickable tab button.

props.name: content
props.description: The DOM payload rendered below when this tab is selected.

props.name: className
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: tabClassName
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: activeTabClassName
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: onChange
props.description: Description coming soon

docs.overview: AnimatedTabs uses a layoutId-driven underline or pill indicator to transition between tabs with a fluid spring. The active indicator follows the selected tab without a hard jump.

scenarios.title: Settings panel
scenarios.description: A classic tab bar for separating profile, notifications, and security settings.

scenarios.title: Dashboard content switcher
scenarios.description: Switch between weekly, monthly, and yearly data views in a dashboard.

scenarios.title: Product feature showcase tabs
scenarios.description: Let marketing highlight different product features with animated tab transitions.

components.name: Magnetic Button
components.description: Button that stretches toward the cursor when nearby and snaps back with spring physics.

props.name: children
props.description: The internal content of the button.

props.name: className
props.description: Style overrides appended to the interactive boundary.

props.name: magneticStrength
props.description: Float determining how fast/far the button lerps toward the cursor.

props.name: magneticRadius
props.description: Pixel radius extending outward from the button where gravity begins.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Standard click event handler.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and magnetic gravitational pull.

docs.overview: MagneticButton adds a physics-based cursor attraction effect to any button or interactive element. As the cursor approaches, the element gently pulls toward it, creating a satisfying tactile feel.

scenarios.title: Primary CTA button
scenarios.description: Apply the magnetic effect to your hero CTA to make it irresistible to click.

scenarios.title: Icon navigation links
scenarios.description: Magnetic icons in a header or dock feel playful and high-quality.

scenarios.title: Reduced-strength subtle hover
scenarios.description: Lower the strength for elements that should feel premium but not distracting.

components.name: Infinite Marquee
components.description: Seamless infinite-scrolling ticker with pause-on-hover and variable speed.

props.name: children
props.description: Individual cards, images, or elements you want scrolling seamlessly.

props.name: className
props.description: Styling classes mapping to the outer tracking viewport.

props.name: speed
props.description: Scrolling velocity, representing translation pixels per second.

props.name: direction
props.description: Horizontal (left/right) scroll direction.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Temporarily pause the animation sequence when a user points at the element.

props.name: gap
props.description: Consistent spacing separating each repeated instance loop.

docs.overview: InfiniteMarquee continuously scrolls a row of items horizontally, looping seamlessly. It's commonly used for logo strips, testimonial tickers, and feature highlights.

scenarios.title: Client logo strip
scenarios.description: Showcase trusted brand logos below the hero section to build social proof.

scenarios.title: Bidirectional feature ticker
scenarios.description: Two rows scrolling in opposite directions create depth and visual interest for a features section.

components.name: Scroll Reveal
components.description: Elements animate into view when they enter the viewport, with 6 animation presets.

props.name: children
props.description: The DOM elements to animate into view upon scrolling.

props.name: className
props.description: Styling classes mapping to the outer tracking viewport.

props.name: animation
props.description: The specific animation choreography preset (e.g. 'fade-up', 'scale-in').

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay in seconds before the animation begins.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration in seconds for the reveal animation.

props.name: threshold
props.description: Intersection ratio (0-1) required to trigger the reveal.

props.name: once
props.description: Whether the element should hide and re-animate when scrolled out and back in.

docs.overview: ScrollReveal wraps any element and fades + slides it into view when it enters the viewport using an IntersectionObserver. Zero layout shift, respects prefers-reduced-motion.

scenarios.title: Staggered feature list
scenarios.description: Reveal bullet points one by one as the user scrolls down a features section.

scenarios.title: Animated section headers
scenarios.description: Reveal each section heading with a subtle upward drift as the user reaches it.

components.name: Skeleton Shimmer
components.description: Skeleton loading placeholders with animated shimmer gradient sweep and pulse fade.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS configuration applied to the background container.

props.name: width
props.description: Explicit CSS width for the placeholder element.

props.name: height
props.description: Explicit CSS height for the placeholder element.

props.name: rounded
props.description: Tailwind border-radius abstraction class string (e.g. 'md', 'full').

props.name: count
props.description: Number of consecutive skeleton items to iterate.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing separating consecutive skeleton layers.

docs.overview: SkeletonShimmer renders animated placeholder shapes with a sweeping shimmer to indicate loading state. Includes SkeletonCard and SkeletonText convenience wrappers for common patterns.

scenarios.title: Content feed loading state
scenarios.description: Replace a list of posts with skeleton rows while data fetches, preventing layout shift.

scenarios.title: Article body placeholder
scenarios.description: Show a paragraph skeleton while a blog post loads, keeping the reading layout intact.

scenarios.title: Dashboard stat cards
scenarios.description: Display skeleton placeholders for metric cards while analytics data loads.

components.name: Morphing Modal
components.description: Modal that expands from the trigger element with spring physics and backdrop blur.

props.name: children
props.description: The payload rendering inside the physical boundaries of the modal dialog box.

props.name: className
props.description: Tailwind definitions passing specific sizes and visuals onto the dialog constraint.

props.name: layoutId
props.description: Unique arbitrary string utilized by Framer Motion to tie trigger layout transitions.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Description coming soon

components.usageCode:
"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { MorphingModal, MorphingModalTrigger } from "@/components/ui/morphing-modal"; export default function Example() { const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false); return ( <>
setModalOpen(true)} className="p-6 rounded-xl bg-neutral-900/50 border border-neutral-800 hover:border-neutral-700 transition-colors max-w-xs text-white" >

Click to open modal

This card morphs into a modal with spring physics.

setModalOpen(false)} layoutId="modal-demo" >

Morphing Modal

This modal expands from the trigger element with spring-based animation. It supports Escape key to close, click-outside to dismiss, and an animated close button.

); }

docs.overview: MorphingModal animates open/close with a spring-driven scale and blur, making overlays feel fluid rather than jarring. Supports a trigger element for shared-layout animations.

scenarios.title: Confirmation dialog
scenarios.description: Use the modal for destructive actions — a focused modal prevents accidental clicks better than inline prompts.

scenarios.title: Image / media preview
scenarios.description: Expand a thumbnail into a full preview with a smooth morph transition.

scenarios.title: Multi-step onboarding modal
scenarios.description: Use internal state to drive a step-by-step flow inside a single modal instance.

components.name: Gradient Text Reveal
components.description: Word-by-word text reveal with gradient coloring and blur-to-clear spring animation.

props.name: text
props.description: The exact sentence paragraph targeted for staggered rendering.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes mapping typographic configurations.

props.name: gradientFrom
props.description: Color indicating the start coordinate mapping of the visual gradient ramp.

props.name: gradientTo
props.description: Terminal color definition ending the textual mask gradient.

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Seconds mapping the offset differential delay evaluating subsequent sequential words.

props.name: duration
props.description: Metric representation detailing exact sequence total span (measured in seconds).

props.name: once
props.description: Prevent re-evaluating the intersection layout and permanently mark complete once run.

props.name: as
props.description: Explicit HTML element defining correct semantics matching the parent boundary box.

docs.overview: GradientTextReveal animates a gradient sweep across text as it enters the viewport — a dramatic way to introduce headlines or key phrases on scroll.

scenarios.title: Section headline reveal
scenarios.description: Fire the reveal when the section scrolls into view for a cinematic entrance.

scenarios.title: Pull quote in a blog post
scenarios.description: Highlight a key quote mid-article with a gradient sweep to re-engage readers.

components.name: Scramble Text
components.description: Matrix-style text scramble effect that resolves characters left-to-right.

props.name: text
props.description: The target string the scramble transition eventually resolves into.

props.name: className
props.description: Standard Tailwind configuration for typographic adjustment.

props.name: speed
props.description: Multiplier scaling the character mutation flip rate.

props.name: scrambleDuration
props.description: Duration the sequence spends generating noise before revealing real characters.

props.name: triggerOnView
props.description: Wait until intersection observers detect the element on screen before starting.

props.name: once
props.description: Lock the transition state as resolved after completing one full loop.

props.name: characterSet
props.description: A custom dictionary string configuring the alphabet the noise generator selects from.

docs.overview: ScrambleText rapidly cycles through random characters before resolving to the final string, giving text a cinematic decryption reveal. Triggers on scroll entry by default, or on hover when triggerOnView is false.

scenarios.title: Terminal-style hero headline
scenarios.description: Place ScrambleText on a dark hero section to mimic a hacker-terminal aesthetic as the page loads.

scenarios.title: Hover-to-decode nav labels
scenarios.description: Set triggerOnView=false so the effect fires on mouse enter — great for navigation links or interactive badges.

scenarios.title: Redacted-then-revealed quote
scenarios.description: Reveal a testimonial quote with a scramble effect as the reader scrolls to the section.

components.name: Meteors Card
components.description: Card with animated meteor/shooting star particles falling through the background.

props.name: children
props.description: The payload rendering above the background particle effect.

props.name: className
props.description: Layout configurations for the wrapping card boundary.

props.name: meteorCount
props.description: Total integer quantity defining maximum concurrent active meteor particles.

props.name: meteorColor
props.description: Hex string establishing the primary focal styling of light trails.

docs.overview: MeteorsCard wraps content in a card with animated meteor streaks flying across it. The custom Tailwind animation is installed automatically via `uniqueui add`.

scenarios.title: Hero spotlight card
scenarios.description: Use a single MeteorsCard as a dark hero panel with a short headline and supporting line so the meteor field reads behind the copy.

components.name: Flip Card
components.description: 3D card flip with spring physics, supporting hover or click triggers.

props.name: front
props.description: The leading visible standard interface node.

props.name: back
props.description: The trailing hidden secondary information node.

props.name: className
props.description: Overarching classes driving constraints on the 3D rotating canvas.

props.name: frontClassName
props.description: Granular overrides for the un-rotated visual state.

props.name: backClassName
props.description: Granular overrides targeting the inverted 180-degree state representation.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Enum literal targeting 'hover' execution or explicit 'click' toggles.

props.name: direction
props.description: Axis orientation literal mapping rotation logic to 'horizontal' vs 'vertical'.

props.name: perspective
props.description: Z-depth translation simulating three-dimensional depth stretching.

docs.overview: FlipCard reveals a back face on hover or click with a smooth 3D rotation. Supports horizontal and vertical flip axes and can wrap any React content on either face.

scenarios.title: Team member bio card
scenarios.description: Show a photo and name on the front; reveal role, bio, and social links on the back.

scenarios.title: Click-to-reveal FAQ card
scenarios.description: Use trigger="click" and vertical flip for a fun alternative to a standard accordion.

components.name: Dot Grid Background
components.description: Interactive dot-grid pattern with a glowing cursor-following effect.

props.name: children
props.description: Components mapped into the z-index layer visually above the matrix.

props.name: className
props.description: Container abstraction classes.

props.name: dotColor
props.description: Color code controlling the default un-illuminated grid representation.

props.name: dotSize
props.description: Diameter specifying visual footprint density of single grid intersections.

props.name: gap
props.description: Vector translation pixel count separating independent grid items.

props.name: hoverRadius
props.description: Spread area around the cursor triggering focus interactions.

props.name: hoverScale
props.description: Float magnitude expanding intersections actively caught inside the hover bounds.

docs.overview: DotGridBackground renders a canvas-based animated dot grid that reacts to mouse movement with ripple propagation. Dots scale and shift colour as the cursor passes, creating an interactive depth effect behind any wrapped content.

scenarios.title: Interactive hero section
scenarios.description: Wrap a hero headline in DotGridBackground to create an eye-catching, cursor-reactive landing section.

scenarios.title: Bento grid cell background
scenarios.description: Use as a decorative background inside individual bento grid cells for subtle interactivity.

scenarios.title: Full-page app background
scenarios.description: Render at viewport height as a fixed or full-page background layer behind your main layout.

components.name: Floating Dock
components.description: macOS-style dock with magnetic scaling, spring physics, and tooltips.

props.name: items
props.description: Array defining mapping configuration objects containing icons and references.

props.name: id
props.description: A unique mapping identifier referencing the component node.

props.name: icon
props.description: The SVG image rendered actively on the dock interface.

props.name: label
props.description: String payload rendered inside the expanding tooltip layout.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Routine capturing specific explicit interactions mapped to the dock region.

props.name: href
props.description: Link routing path if the interface object encapsulates an anchor tag natively.

props.name: className
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: maxScale
props.description: Description coming soon

props.name: magneticRange
props.description: Description coming soon

docs.overview: FloatingDock renders a macOS-style icon dock with a magnetic magnification effect. Icons near the cursor scale up smoothly, making navigation feel interactive and playful.

scenarios.title: App bottom navigation
scenarios.description: Replace a static mobile nav bar with a floating dock for a more expressive feel.

scenarios.title: Social media quick-share dock
scenarios.description: A share toolbar that floats alongside article content for quick social sharing.

scenarios.title: Document editor toolbar
scenarios.description: A compact formatting toolbar with magnification for a rich-text or canvas editor.

components.name: Confetti Burst
components.description: Click-triggered confetti particle explosion with customizable colors and physics.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element wrapped by the particle generation effect zone.

props.name: className
props.description: Styling configurations for the interaction wrapper logic container.

props.name: particleCount
props.description: Quantity multiplier defining how many fragments evaluate per execution.

props.name: colors
props.description: Array defining hex code palettes defining sequential particle rendering.

props.name: spread
props.description: Radiant measurement indicating geometric angle variance for throwing trajectories.

props.name: duration
props.description: Timer limit capping maximum gravity simulation lifetime.

docs.overview: ConfettiBurst fires a particle explosion from a point on screen — perfect for celebrating milestones like a completed form, a successful payment, or an unlocked achievement.

scenarios.title: Success after form submission
scenarios.description: Trigger a confetti burst when the user completes a sign-up or checkout form.

scenarios.title: Achievement unlock
scenarios.description: Celebrate when a user reaches a milestone inside a dashboard or onboarding flow.

components.name: Drawer Slide
components.description: Slide-out drawer panel with drag-to-dismiss, spring physics, and backdrop blur.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: React state abstraction determining visible rendering.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Method triggered when dismiss actions evaluation (drag, backdrop, external limit).

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the active sliding sheet.

props.name: position
props.description: Anchoring enumeration bounding left, right, top, or bottom screen edges.

props.name: className
props.description: Specific styling modifiers passing onto the physical sliding panel.

props.name: overlayClassName
props.description: Specific styling modifiers passing onto the dimming backdrop.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS explicit translation sizing left/right sliding panels.

props.name: height
props.description: CSS explicit translation sizing top/bottom sliding panels.

props.name: dragToClose
props.description: Map touch swiping events onto gesture recognizers supporting drag dismiss.

docs.overview: DrawerSlide animates a panel in from any screen edge (left, right, top, bottom) over a blurred overlay. Supports drag-to-close, keyboard Escape dismissal, and aria-modal focus trapping.

scenarios.title: Navigation sidebar
scenarios.description: Open a left-edge drawer for primary navigation on mobile layouts.

scenarios.title: Bottom sheet for mobile actions
scenarios.description: Use a bottom-edge drawer as a mobile action sheet instead of a modal dialog.

components.name: Notification Stack
components.description: Stacked toast notifications with auto-dismiss progress, sliding animations, and multiple types.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS attributes tailoring the absolute container.

props.name: position
props.description: Screen coordinate literal dictating orientation constraints.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Limit quantity threshold managing physical screen stack instances.

docs.overview: NotificationStack renders a stacked pile of toast-style cards that animate in and collapse when dismissed. Great for live activity feeds, system alerts, or social notifications.

scenarios.title: Live activity feed
scenarios.description: Push real-time events (new users, payments, deployments) into the stack.

scenarios.title: Form validation errors
scenarios.description: Surface validation errors as dismissible stacked notices instead of inline messages.

components.name: Animated Timeline
components.description: Scroll-triggered timeline with 4 distinct Motion.dev animation variants: vertical spring, horizontal growing line, alternating cards, and numbered steps.

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered array of timeline items (id, title, description, date, color, icon).

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout and animation style. Defaults to "vertical".

props.name: lineColor
props.description: Connecting line color. Defaults to rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the root wrapper.

variants.label: Vertical
Horizontal
Cards
Steps

docs.overview: AnimatedTimeline renders a sequence of events with scroll-triggered entry animations. Four layout variants are supported: vertical (default staggered list), horizontal (left-to-right with growing connectors), cards (alternating left/right), and steps (numbered progress).

scenarios.title: Product roadmap
scenarios.description: Use the vertical variant with colour-coded dots to visualise upcoming releases at a glance.

scenarios.title: Onboarding steps
scenarios.description: Switch to the steps variant to guide users through a numbered setup process.

scenarios.title: Horizontal milestone strip
scenarios.description: Use the horizontal variant for a compact milestone strip in a company history or press section.

components.name: Nested Comments
components.description: Threaded comment section with infinite nesting, animated expand/collapse, inline reply composer, and spring-physics like button.

props.name: comments
props.description: Array of top-level comment objects, each optionally containing a `replies` array for nested threading.

props.name: maxDepth
props.description: Maximum nesting depth allowed before disabling the Reply button to prevent infinite threading.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root wrapper element.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Hex or CSS color used for reply badge highlights and interactive accent elements.

props.name: onReply
props.description: Callback fired when a user submits a reply, receiving the parent comment ID and reply text.

props.name: onLike
props.description: Callback fired when a user likes a comment, receiving the comment ID.

docs.overview: NestedComments renders a threaded discussion tree with animated reply forms, like/unlike interactions, and configurable nesting depth. Avatars are generated from initials when no image is provided.

scenarios.title: Blog post discussion
scenarios.description: Embed below a blog article to allow readers to reply, like, and thread conversations.

scenarios.title: Community Q&A thread
scenarios.description: Use maxDepth to cap nesting at 2 levels, keeping long threads readable.

components.name: Hover Reveal Card
components.description: Card that displays an image with teaser content, then slides up a full details panel on hover with staggered Motion.dev animations.

props.name: image
props.description: URL of the image displayed as the card's primary visual.

props.name: imageAlt
props.description: Accessible alt text attached to the img element.

props.name: tag
props.description: Small uppercase label rendered above the heading in both states.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary headline text displayed in both the default and reveal states.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Supporting line shown beneath the title in the default state and as a footer in the reveal panel.

props.name: description
props.description: Extended body copy that appears only inside the slide-up hover panel.

props.name: ctaText
props.description: Call-to-action label rendered at the bottom of the hover panel.

props.name: href
props.description: When supplied the wrapper renders as an anchor element pointing to this URL.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Hex or CSS colour driving the tag, CTA text, and border-glow accent.

props.name: className
props.description: Tailwind utility classes forwarded onto the outermost card wrapper.

props.name: imageHeight
props.description: Pixel height reserved for the image section before the content area.

docs.overview: HoverRevealCard slides a rich content panel up from the bottom of an image card on hover, replacing the static caption with a description, CTA, and accent glow. Great for portfolio grids and blog previews.

scenarios.title: Portfolio project grid
scenarios.description: Display project thumbnails that reveal a description and link when hovered.
scenarios.code:
import { HoverRevealCard } from "@/components/ui/hover-reveal-card"; export default function PortfolioGrid() { return (
); }

scenarios.title: Blog post preview cards
scenarios.description: Turn a simple blog listing into an interactive card grid with article descriptions on hover.

components.name: Bento Grid
components.description: Responsive masonry-style grid layout with staggered scroll-reveal entrance, hover border glow, and icon scale animations per cell.

props.name: title
props.description: Headline text displayed at the bottom of the card.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting body text shown beneath the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element rendered inside a pill at the top of the card.

props.name: background
props.description: Optional decorative layer (image, gradient, SVG) rendered behind the content.

props.name: cta
props.description: Call-to-action label that slides up into view on hover.

props.name: href
props.description: When supplied the card renders as an anchor element.

props.name: className
props.description: Grid span and sizing classes forwarded to the cell wrapper, e.g. col-span-2 or row-span-2.

props.name: spinBorder
props.description: Enable the spinning conic-gradient border effect (same technique as the hero button). Replaces the static border.

props.name: spinBorderColors
props.description: Two hex/CSS color values for the conic gradient. Defaults to ["#E2CBFF", "#393BB2"] (purple–indigo).

variants.label: Features
Showcase
Stats
Team

docs.overview: BentoGrid lays out content cards in an asymmetric masonry-style grid inspired by Apple's design language. Each cell can span multiple columns or rows, with animated entrance and hover effects.

scenarios.title: Product feature overview
scenarios.description: Showcase multiple features in a single glanceable grid without overwhelming the user.

scenarios.title: Personal portfolio grid
scenarios.description: Display projects, skills, and social links in an editorial bento layout.

components.name: Particle Field
components.description: Canvas-based floating particles with mouse-repulsion physics and responsive connecting lines.

props.name: particleCount
props.description: The number of particles rendered dynamically.

props.name: particleColor
props.description: One hex color or an array of hex colors for particles and connecting lines.

props.name: speed
props.description: The base movement speed multiplier.

props.name: interactionRadius
props.description: The pixel radius for the mouse repulsion event.

variants.label: Single Color
Multi Color

docs.overview: ParticleField renders a canvas-based animated particle system that reacts to cursor proximity. Particles drift, connect with lines when close, and scatter away from the mouse.

scenarios.title: Ambient hero background
scenarios.description: Use as a full-section background layer behind hero text for a subtle, living atmosphere.

scenarios.title: Feature section accent
scenarios.description: Apply to an individual feature card panel to add depth without distracting from the content.

components.name: Horizontal Scroll Gallery
components.description: Converts vertical scroll into horizontal movement with momentum physics for immersive galleries.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of React nodes (e.g. images, cards) to map across the horizontal track.

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction the track moves when the user scrolls down.

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: Common classes applied to every individual container.

docs.overview: HorizontalScrollGallery converts vertical scroll into a smooth horizontal pan across a row of items, driven by a spring-dampened progress value. The gallery pins to the viewport for the full scroll distance.

scenarios.title: Portfolio project showcase
scenarios.description: Lay out project images in a wide horizontal strip that users pan through by scrolling.

scenarios.title: Feature card reel
scenarios.description: Scroll through a reel of feature cards, each revealing itself as the user pans right.

components.name: Radial Menu
components.description: Circular flyout menu that bursts items outward from a center trigger with staggered spring animation.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of item configurations representing the burst actions.

props.name: radius
props.description: Distance in pixels each item travels from the trigger center.

props.name: startAngle
props.description: The starting angle for the radial arc (e.g. -90 for top).

props.name: endAngle
props.description: The concluding angle for the radial arc.

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Staggering time multiplier between cascading children.

docs.overview: RadialMenu bursts a configurable set of action buttons outward from a central trigger in an arc or full circle, using spring-animated entry and exit. Closes on outside click.

scenarios.title: Quick action toolbar
scenarios.description: Provide fast access to common actions without consuming screen real estate when the menu is closed.

scenarios.title: Canvas drawing tool picker
scenarios.description: Expand a top-half arc above the trigger so the menu does not overlap a canvas drawing surface.

components.name: Cursor Trail
components.description: Glowing trail that follows the cursor with decay physics, like a sparkler or comet tail.

props.name: color
props.description: The color of the trail particles.

props.name: trailLength
props.description: Maximum number of particles rendering concurrently.

props.name: size
props.description: Base size of the trailing particle dots.

props.name: decayDuration
props.description: How long it takes for a drawn particle to fade and shrink out.

docs.overview: CursorTrail renders a sequence of fading particles that follow the cursor across the page, creating a comet-like tail effect. Trail length, size, colour, and decay speed are all configurable.

scenarios.title: Magic wand cursor for interactive demos
scenarios.description: Enable a glowing trail on a dedicated demo page to delight visitors and signal interactivity.

scenarios.title: Brand-coloured trail on a landing page
scenarios.description: Match the trail colour to your primary brand colour for a cohesive, premium feel.

components.name: Interactive Cursor
components.description: Spring-smoothed cursor overlay with magnetic hover states, click ripples, optional particles, and support for full-page or container-scoped interactions.

props.name: color
props.description: Primary color for the cursor dot.

props.name: clickColor
props.description: Ripple and particle color used on click.

props.name: glow
props.description: Enables the trailing glow around the cursor.

props.name: trailColor
props.description: Color of the outer ring and trailing glow.

props.name: particleEffect
props.description: Whether click interactions emit particles.

props.name: magneticPull
props.description: Snaps the cursor toward interactive elements such as buttons and links.

props.name: hideSystemCursor
props.description: Hides the native cursor while the component is mounted.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Optional ref limiting the interaction area to a specific container instead of the full window.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes applied to the overlay root.

docs.overview: InteractiveCursor replaces the native cursor with a custom animated dot and ring that react to clicks with particle bursts and ripple rings. Uses a React portal so it renders above all other layers.

scenarios.title: Branded cursor on a marketing page
scenarios.description: Replace the default cursor with a branded one that matches your primary accent colour.

scenarios.title: Interactive demo showcase
scenarios.description: Enable the cursor on a dedicated component showcase page to enhance the sense of interactivity.

components.name: Pen Cursor
components.description: Physics-driven ribbon trail rendered on canvas — a chain of linked points follows the mouse with spring-damping inertia, width scales with speed, and colors interpolate head-to-tail. Inspired by obsidianassembly.com.

props.name: trailLength
props.description: Number of chain-linked trail points. Default 60.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum ribbon width in px (scales with speed). Default 1.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Minimum ribbon width in px at the tail. Default 1.

props.name: damping
props.description: Spring damping for the head point (0–1). Default 0.6.

props.name: speedInfluence
props.description: How much mouse speed widens the ribbon (0–1). Default 0.9.

props.name: colorHead
props.description: RGB string for the ribbon head color. Default "159, 175, 155" (sage green).

props.name: colorTail
props.description: RGB string for the ribbon tail color. Default "198, 167, 106" (warm gold).

props.name: alphaHead
props.description: Opacity at the ribbon head (0–1). Default 0.9.

props.name: alphaTail
props.description: Opacity at the ribbon tail (0–1). Default 0.

props.name: hideSystemCursor
props.description: Hide the system cursor while mounted. Default false.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Optional. Limits drawing to this element; parent should be `relative`. Omit for full-window tracking.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the canvas element.

docs.overview: PenCursor draws a ribbon-like ink trail that follows the mouse with spring-driven inertia, tapering from a thick head to a thin tail. Renders on a fullscreen canvas overlay positioned above page content.

scenarios.title: Creative portfolio cursor
scenarios.description: Add a painterly ink ribbon cursor to a design or illustration portfolio to reinforce the creative brand.

scenarios.title: Handwriting effect on a landing page
scenarios.description: Use a thin, fast trail to simulate a ballpoint pen writing across the screen as users navigate.

components.name: Glow Hero Section
components.description: Physics-driven hero section with an interactive aqueous mesh canvas, spring-based motion text entrance, and fully configurable badge, heading, description, colors, and dimensions.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS classes applied to the root container.

props.name: height
props.description: Tailwind height class for the component, e.g. "h-screen" or "h-[600px]".

props.name: badge
props.description: Text shown in the badge above the heading. Pass null to hide the badge entirely.

props.name: heading
props.description: Main heading text.

props.name: description
props.description: Subheading / description paragraph beneath the heading.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: CSS background color of the container behind the mesh canvas.

props.name: meshColorStart
props.description: Start color of the linear gradient applied to mesh lines.

props.name: meshColorEnd
props.description: End color of the linear gradient applied to mesh lines.

props.name: meshOpacity
props.description: Overall opacity of the mesh canvas layer (0–1).

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Pixel size of each mesh grid cell. Smaller = denser mesh.

props.name: mouseRadius
props.description: Radius in pixels within which mouse movement repels mesh grid points.

variants.label: Default
Dark Theme
No Badge

docs.overview: GlowHeroSection is a full-width hero component with a customizable radial glow effect behind the content. It combines a gradient background, centered text hierarchy, and optional CTA buttons into one production-ready section.

scenarios.description: The most common pattern — headline, subheadline, and two CTA buttons over a dark glowing background.

Custom

docs.overview: LimelightNav is an animated tab bar with a glowing spotlight indicator that slides between items using a shared layout animation. Works as a mobile bottom nav or desktop tab strip.

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Configurable data table with optional column freeze (left/right), customizable header and body colors and backgrounds, optional borders, and optional sortable columns.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions: key, label, and optional sortKey for sortable columns.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each row is an object keyed by column key.

props.name: freezeColumns
props.description: Which columns to freeze when horizontally scrolling: none, left, right, or both sides.

props.name: freezeCount
props.description: Legacy fallback count used only when freezeLeftCount or freezeRightCount are not provided.

props.name: freezeLeftCount
props.description: How many columns to freeze on the left when freezeColumns is "left" or "both".

props.name: freezeRightCount
props.description: How many columns to freeze on the right when freezeColumns is "right" or "both".

props.name: paginated
props.description: Enable built-in pagination controls.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Number of rows per page when paginated is true.

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Optional list of page sizes to show in a selector.

props.name: initialPage
props.description: Initial page index (1-based) when paginated is true.

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Called when the current page or page size changes.

props.name: paginationPreviousLabel
props.description: Previous-page control content; defaults to a left chevron icon.

props.name: paginationNextLabel
props.description: Next-page control content; defaults to a right chevron icon.

props.name: getRowKey
props.description: Optional stable key per row for React reconciliation (sort, pagination). Defaults to row.id / row.key when string or number, else a generated key.

props.name: headerTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for header text, e.g. text-neutral-900.

props.name: bodyTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for body cell text.

props.name: headerBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for header background, e.g. bg-neutral-100.

props.name: bodyBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for body background.

props.name: border
props.description: Whether to show table and cell borders.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Whether column headers with sortKey are clickable to sort.

props.name: onSort
props.description: Callback when sort changes (for controlled use).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the root wrapper.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme for default header/body colors when not overridden.

variants.label: Default
Freeze left
Freeze right
Freeze both
Bordered
Sortable
Custom colors
Full options

docs.overview: DataTable renders a fully-featured table with optional client-side sorting, pagination with configurable page sizes, and sticky column freezing on the left and/or right edges. Theming and all colour tokens are customisable.

scenarios.title: Sortable team roster
scenarios.description: Display a team list with column-level sorting so managers can quickly find members by name or role.

scenarios.title: Paginated transaction log
scenarios.description: Handle large datasets with pagination by using paginated, pageSize, and pageSizeOptions props.

components.name: Morphing Card Stack
components.description: An interactive collection of cards that smoothly layout-morphs between Stack, Grid, and List configurations using Framer Motion springs.

props.name: cards
props.description: Array of CardData containing id, title, description, icon, and optional color.

props.name: defaultLayout
props.description: Initial layout mode configuration.

props.name: onCardClick
props.description: Callback function triggered when clicking a card.

variants.label: Default

docs.overview: MorphingCardStack displays a set of cards that morph between Stack (swipeable fan), Grid, and List layout modes using shared layout animations. The top card in stack mode is draggable to cycle through cards.

scenarios.title: Feature showcase carousel
scenarios.description: Present key product features as a swipeable stack that users can fan into a grid for an overview.

scenarios.title: Kanban-style task switcher
scenarios.description: Start in list layout for a compact task view and let users switch to grid for a spatial overview.

components.name: Multi-Step Auth Card
components.description: Animation-first enterprise auth flow: email discovery, first-time and returning user paths, password create/login, and OTP verification with spring transitions between steps.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the outer card container.

props.name: initialState
props.description: Starting step: "email" | "unregistered" | "first-time" | "create-password" | "password-login" | "otp".

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Called whenever the active auth step changes.

props.name: onSubmitEmail
props.type: (email: string) => Promise<{ exists: boolean; registered: boolean }>
props.description: If provided, drives routing after email submit; otherwise demo heuristics apply (e.g. email containing "new" or "err").

props.name: onSubmitPassword
props.description: Called on password login submit. Return false to stay on this step and show an error; any other return (including void) advances to OTP on success.

props.name: onCreatePassword
props.description: Called when saving a new password. Return false to stay on this step and show an error; otherwise advance to OTP.

props.name: onSubmitOTP
props.description: Called when the user submits a six-digit code. Return false to show an invalid-code message without leaving the step.

props.name: onResendOTP
props.description: Optional resend handler. Return false to keep the current timer and code; on throw or false, resend count is not incremented.

props.name: strings
props.description: Deep-partial overrides for all UI copy; defaults are exported as MULTI_STEP_AUTH_DEFAULT_STRINGS for reference and i18n.

props.name: otpResendCooldownSeconds
props.description: Countdown length before the resend action is available again.

props.name: otpMaxResends
props.description: Maximum resend taps before the UI locks resend.

props.name: demoEmailDelayMs
props.description: Artificial delay after email submit when onSubmitEmail is omitted (demo mode).

props.name: demoPasswordDelayMs
props.description: Artificial delay after password/OTP demo submits when the matching handler is omitted.

props.name: requireTermsConsent
props.description: When true, the initial email step shows a terms/privacy checkbox and blocks submit until it is checked. Set false to hide it.

props.name: termsUrl
props.description: URL for the 'Terms of Service' consent link.

props.name: privacyUrl
props.description: URL for the 'Privacy Policy' consent link.

docs.overview: MultiStepAuthCard is a self-contained multi-step authentication flow covering email lookup, password creation, password login, and OTP verification. Each step transitions with a smooth slide animation and all strings are overridable for i18n.

scenarios.title: Standalone sign-in page
scenarios.description: Drop in as a standalone auth card in a centred layout — the component handles all state transitions internally.

scenarios.title: Modal authentication
scenarios.description: Embed inside a dialog overlay so users can sign in without leaving the current page context.

components.name: Shiny Text
components.description: A shimmering highlight that continuously sweeps across text — perfect for hero taglines and call-to-action copy.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content to render.

props.name: speed
props.description: Duration of one shimmer pass in seconds.

props.name: shimmerWidth
props.description: Width of the bright band as a percentage.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes (font size, weight, colour, etc.).

props.name: theme
props.description: Controls the shimmer palette.

docs.overview: ShinyText adds a moving shimmer highlight that sweeps across your text using a CSS background-clip animation. Ideal for hero taglines, badge labels, or any copy that needs a premium metallic feel.

scenarios.title: Hero tagline highlight
scenarios.description: Draw attention to a key phrase in your hero section with a continuous shimmer sweep.

scenarios.title: Premium badge label
scenarios.description: Use a smaller shimmer span inside a pill badge to signal a paid or featured tier.

scenarios.title: CTA button text
scenarios.description: Give a call-to-action button a shimmering label to make it pop on dark landing pages.

components.name: Blur Reveal
components.description: Characters or words materialise from a soft blur — the cinematic text entrance used in top SaaS hero sections.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to animate.

props.name: animateBy
props.description: Whether to stagger individual characters or whole words.

props.name: delay
props.description: Extra delay before the animation starts (seconds).

props.name: duration
props.description: Spring duration per item.

props.name: once
props.description: Only animate on first scroll-enter.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme context.

docs.overview: BlurReveal staggers a blur-fade-in animation across each character or word as the element enters the viewport. It creates an elegant reveal effect perfect for hero text and section headings.

scenarios.title: Hero heading entrance
scenarios.description: Animate your primary headline character-by-character as the page loads.

scenarios.title: Section subtitle word reveal
scenarios.description: Reveal a section subtitle word-by-word for a slightly slower, more dramatic effect.

components.name: Count Up
components.description: An animated number that counts from a starting value to a target when scrolled into view — essential for metrics and stats sections.

props.name: to
props.description: Target (end) value.

props.name: from
props.description: Starting value.

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds.

props.name: decimals
props.description: Number of decimal places.

props.name: prefix
props.description: Prepended string, e.g. "$".

props.name: suffix
props.description: Appended string, e.g. "k+".

props.name: separator
props.description: Thousands separator. Pass empty string to disable.

props.name: once
props.description: Only animate on first scroll-enter.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme context.

docs.overview: CountUp animates a number from a starting value to a target value as it enters the viewport. It supports decimals, prefixes, suffixes, and thousands separators — perfect for stats and metrics sections.

scenarios.title: Stats row
scenarios.description: Display key product metrics that animate in when the user scrolls to them.

scenarios.title: Revenue counter with currency prefix
scenarios.description: Show an animated revenue or savings figure with a dollar sign prefix.

components.name: Border Beam
components.description: A glowing comet that continuously orbits the border of a container — instantly upgrades cards, code blocks, and feature sections.

props.name: children
props.description: Content inside the bordered container.

props.name: duration
props.description: Seconds for one full orbit.

props.name: colorFrom
props.description: Comet head colour.

props.name: colorTo
props.description: Comet tail colour.

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the glowing orb in px.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Width of the container border in px.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes on the container.

props.name: theme
props.description: Controls border colour.

docs.overview: BorderBeam traces an animated glowing orb around the perimeter of any container using requestAnimationFrame. Wrap any card, input, or panel to give it a dynamic, premium border highlight.

scenarios.title: Glowing feature card
scenarios.description: Surround a feature card with a colour-shifting comet beam that draws the eye.

scenarios.title: Highlighted input field
scenarios.description: Make an email or search input stand out with an animated beam instead of a static focus ring.

components.name: Ripple
components.description: Luminous orbs that drift slowly across the viewport — a liquid nebula hero background with warm, organic colour blooms.

props.name: mainCircleSize
props.description: Controls orb diameter — each orb renders at mainCircleSize × 4.5 px.

props.name: mainCircleOpacity
props.description: Peak opacity for every orb (0–1). Individual orbs shimmer around this value.

props.name: numCircles
props.description: Number of orbs to render. Capped at 8.

props.name: color
props.description: Pin all orbs to one colour (hex or rgba). Omit to use the built-in warm palette.

props.name: duration
props.description: Base drift-cycle length in seconds. Each orb is staggered so they never move in sync.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the wrapper div.

docs.overview: Ripple renders luminous drifting orbs across a dark background for a liquid-nebula hero effect. Tune `mainCircleSize`, `mainCircleOpacity`, `numCircles` (capped at 8), `color`, and `duration` to dial in the atmosphere — works well layered behind hero copy, product stages, and ambient panels.

scenarios.title: Live presence indicator
scenarios.description: Show a pulsing ripple behind an avatar to indicate a user is online or broadcasting.

scenarios.title: CTA focus ring
scenarios.description: Add a ripple effect behind a primary CTA button to make it visually magnetic.

components.name: Word Rotate
components.description: A list of words that cycle with slide, flip, or fade transitions — the signature hero-headline effect used across modern SaaS sites.

props.name: words
props.description: Array of words to cycle through.

props.name: interval
props.description: How long each word is shown in ms.

props.name: animation
props.description: Transition style between words.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes (font size, colour, etc.).

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme context.

docs.overview: WordRotate cycles through an array of words with configurable entrance and exit animations — slide, flip, or fade. Drop it inline within headings to convey multiple ideas without extra layout space.

scenarios.title: Hero headline value rotator
scenarios.description: Cycle through your product's core benefits inline inside a headline.

scenarios.title: Feature list rotator with flip
scenarios.description: Use the flip animation for a more dramatic 3-D card-turning effect.

scenarios.title: Subtle fade rotator in body copy
scenarios.description: Use the fade animation for a soft, unobtrusive rotation inside a paragraph.

components.name: ShootingStarsGrid
components.description: A cinematic hero-section background: a faint grid bathed in dark-emerald glow, with thin white streaks that race along grid lanes like falling stars. Built on Motion.dev with compositor-only transforms for smooth 60fps.

props.name: starCount
props.description: Number of concurrent shooting-star streaks. Clamped to 1–80.

props.name: speed
props.description: Base travel duration in seconds. Each star is randomised ±30% around this value.

props.name: glowStrength
props.description: Multiplier (0–1) applied to the streak's box-shadow intensity.

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Pixel spacing between grid lines; streaks snap to these lanes.

props.name: direction
props.description: Axis streaks travel along. "both" picks per star randomly.

props.name: color
props.description: Streak colour. Pass a single CSS colour for a monochrome shower, an array of colours to sample from per star, or omit for the built-in multi-hue palette (white, mint, cyan, amber, pink, violet).

props.name: children
props.description: Optional content layered above the background at z-index 10.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outer container.

docs.overview: ShootingStarsGrid renders a full-bleed animated background suitable for hero sections. It stacks four layers: a near-black base (#020808), a subtle 80px grid drawn with two linear-gradients, a radial emerald glow, and a vignette that fades the outer edges to black. Shooting stars are motion.div elements whose positions snap to grid lanes; their animation uses only transform + opacity so they stay on the GPU compositor. Each star picks a hue from the default multi-colour palette (or from a custom colour/array passed via the `color` prop). Respects prefers-reduced-motion by rendering the grid alone.

scenarios.title: Hero-section background
scenarios.description: Drop ShootingStarsGrid behind a headline as a full-viewport hero background.

scenarios.title: Monochrome brand shower
scenarios.description: Pass a single colour to lock every streak to your brand hue.

scenarios.title: Custom palette
scenarios.description: Pass an array of colours to restrict the shower to a specific set of hues.

scenarios.title: Horizontal-only streaks
scenarios.description: Restrict streaks to the horizontal axis for a calmer, train-window feel.

scenarios.title: Dense, fast streaks for a launch moment
scenarios.description: Bump starCount and speed for a high-energy loader or splash screen.

components.name: DynamicInfo
components.description: An interactive profile pill that shows avatar, name, role, and a live ticking clock. Click to reveal social links and a status indicator. Drop-in floatable via the position prop.

props.name: name
props.description: Display name shown next to the avatar.

props.name: role
props.description: Subtitle rendered under the name (e.g. "Designer").

props.name: avatar
props.description: Image URL for the avatar. Falls back to initials when omitted.

props.name: fallback
props.description: Override the auto-generated initials shown when no avatar is provided.

props.name: position
props.description: Pin the card to a screen edge with fixed positioning, or render inline with "static".

props.name: mergeEdge
props.description: Which edge of the card melts into the surrounding background with a full-width merge bar and concave corner notches. Auto-derived from position (top-* → "top", bottom-* → "bottom", static → "none") but can be overridden.

props.name: cornerSize
props.description: Pixel radius of the concave corner notches that flow out from the merged edge.

props.name: socials
props.type: { id: string; icon: ReactNode; label?: string; href?: string; onClick?: () => void }[]
props.description: Social links revealed when the card expands.

props.name: status
props.description: Status pill shown when expanded. The dot pulses softly using the supplied color.

props.name: showTime
props.description: Show the live ticking clock on the right of the header.

props.name: timeFormat
props.description: Clock format.

props.name: expanded
props.description: Controlled expansion state. When omitted, the component manages its own state.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Initial expansion state when uncontrolled.

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Fires when the card expands or collapses.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color scheme. Pass "system" to follow prefers-color-scheme, or an object with any of background, foreground, mutedForeground, border, avatarBackground, socialBackground, socialForeground, socialHoverBackground, socialHoverForeground, statusBackground for a fully custom palette.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outer container.

docs.overview: DynamicInfo is a compact profile pill that renders an avatar, name, role, and a real-time clock that updates every second. Clicking the card smoothly expands it to reveal a row of social links and a pulsing status indicator. Layout transitions are driven by motion's layout animations with a spring (stiffness 380, damping 30) so the height changes feel organic. The position prop pins the card to any screen edge using fixed positioning. When the card meets an edge (top or bottom), it paints a full-width merge bar behind the pill and renders concave notches outside its corners — every piece uses the card's own background color, so the surface dissolves smoothly into the surrounding UI like a Dynamic Island. Use mergeEdge to force the notch direction (auto-derived from position by default, or pass "none" to disable). Theme accepts "light", "dark", "system" (auto-follows prefers-color-scheme), or a custom palette object to recolor every surface — including the merge bar and notches, since they read from the same palette.

scenarios.title: Hangs flush from the top edge
scenarios.description: Pin to a top position and the full-width merge bar plus flattened top corners make the card feel like it's dropping out of the viewport edge — like a Dynamic Island.

scenarios.title: Expanded with socials and status
scenarios.description: Reveal social links and a live availability indicator on click.

scenarios.title: Light theme, inline
scenarios.description: Render inline with the light surface for sidebars and toolbars.

scenarios.title: Auto-follow system theme
scenarios.description: Pass "system" to track prefers-color-scheme and switch palettes when the user toggles light/dark.

scenarios.title: Custom brand palette
scenarios.description: Pass a colors object to fully recolor every surface — background, borders, social chips, status pill.

scenarios.title: Initials fallback
scenarios.description: Skip the avatar URL to render auto-generated initials instead.

scenarios.title: Controlled expansion
scenarios.description: Drive the open state from outside — useful when sync'ing with a sidebar toggle.
